basic_details.job_title: HPPSC HP Police Constable (Male & Female) Recruitment 2026 - 734 Vacancies
basic_details.short_information: The HPPSC has released a recruitment notice for Police Constable posts (Male and Female) in the HP Police Department. This is the primary government-jobs entry point for candidates tracking Himachal Pradesh Police recruitment in 2026, covering vacancy numbers, category-wise breakup, and the application window. The recruitment is being conducted through the Commission's Online Recruitment Application (ORA) system, available on the official HPPSC website.

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI, or other digital modes. Fee once paid is non-refundable and cannot be adjusted against any other examination.

age_limit.details: Note: The source notifications specify only category-wise age limits above; no separate general age relaxation table (e.g., for PwD, Ex-Servicemen beyond what's listed) is provided.

qualification.details: Candidates in regular Government/Semi-Government service must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) for document verification. Category claimed at the time of application/admit card is treated as final, with limited exceptions beyond the candidate's control. Re-checking or re-evaluation of written examination answer sheets is not permitted under any circumstances. Selected candidates must undergo the Recruitment Training Course (RTC) at PTC Daroh; failure to pass may lead to termination of service. Disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of courts at Shimla.

selection_process: Race 1500 Meters in 5 Min 30 Sec 800 Meters in 3 Min 45 Sec
High Jump 1.35 Meters (max 3 attempts) 1.10 Meters (max 3 attempts)
Broad Jump 4 Meters (max 3 attempts) 3 Meters (max 3 attempts)
Selection to the post of Constable (Male & Female) is made through the following stages:
Physical Test: Physical Standard Test (PST) and Physical Efficiency Test (PET)
conducted by the Himachal Pradesh Police Department. Written Test: Offline multiple-choice objective examination of 2 hours' duration
conducted by HPPSC. Evaluation & Document Verification: Carried out by the Police Department
including award of NCC certificate marks. Medical Examination: Conducted by the Police Department after HPPSC recommendations.
NCC "C" Certificate: 04 Marks NCC "B" Certificate: 02 Marks NCC "A" Certificate: 01 Mark
A candidate holding more than one NCC certificate will be given marks for the highest one only (NCC "C" Certificate).
how_to_apply: Visit the official HPPSC website: http://www.hppsc.hp.gov.in/hppsc
Click on the "Apply Online" link on the home page.
Click on "One Time Registration (OTR) for Examinations" and complete "New Registration" if not already registered.
Log into your OTR account and view live advertisements on the dashboard.
Select the relevant post (Constable Male or Female) and fill in personal details.
Choose one district for Physical Test and Written Test (no change allowed later).
Upload all requisite documents as per the advertisement.
Accept the declaration regarding legibility and accuracy of uploaded documents.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 600/- online.
Submit the application. No changes are allowed after final submission.

content_sections.heading: Quick Highlights
content_sections.text: Organisation : Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) Post : Police Constable (Male) and Police Constable (Female) .: 57/7-2026 (Male), 58/7-2026 (Female) Total Vacancies : 734 (491 Male + 243 Female) Pay Scale : Level 3, Rs. 20,200–64,000 Application Mode : Online Recruitment Application (ORA) Application Start Date : 10 July 2026, 12:01 AM Application Last Date : 6 August 2026, 11:59 PM

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Police Constable Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The HPPSC has released a recruitment notice for Police Constable posts (Male and Female) in the HP Police Department. This is the primary government-jobs entry point for candidates tracking Himachal Pradesh Police recruitment in 2026, covering vacancy numbers, category-wise breakup, and the application window. The recruitment is being conducted through the Commission's Online Recruitment Application (ORA) system, available on the official HPPSC website.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC HP Police Constable Recruitment 2026 - Notification Out
content_sections.text: HPPSC has officially released the Police Constable Recruitment 2026 notice bearing , signed by Nivedita Negi, IAS, Secretary, HP Public Service Commission. The online application link goes live on 10.07.2026. Download HPPSC Police Constable Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here Download HPPSC Police Constable (Female) Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here Download HPPSC Police Constable (Male) Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here Direct Link to Apply for HPPSC Police Constable Recruitment 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates should note the exact application window below, as the Commission has stated that the online link will be disabled after the closing date.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit (As on 01-01-2026)
content_sections.text: Note: The source notifications specify only category-wise age limits above; no separate general age relaxation table (e.g., for PwD, Ex-Servicemen beyond what's listed) is provided.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification / Eligibility
content_sections.text: A candidate must have passed Matriculation and +2 from an Institution/School/Board situated within Himachal Pradesh. This condition (of passing from within Himachal Pradesh) does not apply to Bonafide Himachalis. Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) are not eligible to apply for this examination.

content_sections.heading: HP Police Constable Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection to the post of Constable (Male & Female) is made through the following stages: Physical Test: Physical Standard Test (PST) and Physical Efficiency Test (PET), conducted by the Himachal Pradesh Police Department. Written Test: Offline multiple-choice objective examination of 2 hours' duration, 90 marks, with negative marking, conducted by HPPSC. Evaluation & Document Verification: Carried out by the Police Department, including award of NCC certificate marks. Medical Examination: Conducted by the Police Department after HPPSC recommendations. NCC "C" Certificate: 04 Marks NCC "B" Certificate: 02 Marks NCC "A" Certificate: 01 Mark A candidate holding more than one NCC certificate will be given marks for the highest one only (NCC "C" Certificate).

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee must be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI, or other digital modes. Fee once paid is non-refundable and cannot be adjusted against any other examination.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Matriculation Certificate +2 Certificate NCC Certificate (if applicable) Valid category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/WFF/Ward of Ex-SM, as applicable) Bonafide Himachali Certificate (if Matriculation/+2 passed outside Himachal Pradesh) Valid EWS/BPL Certificate (for EWS category claims) Home Guard Service Certificate issued by the Commandant Home Guards (for HG candidates)

content_sections.heading: Other Important Eligibility Conditions
content_sections.text: Candidates in regular Government/Semi-Government service must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) for document verification. Category claimed at the time of application/admit card is treated as final, with limited exceptions beyond the candidate's control. Re-checking or re-evaluation of written examination answer sheets is not permitted under any circumstances. Selected candidates must undergo the Recruitment Training Course (RTC) at PTC Daroh; failure to pass may lead to termination of service. Disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of courts at Shimla.

faq.question: Q1. How many total vacancies are there in HPPSC Police Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 734 total vacancies - 491 for Police Constable (Male) and 243 for Police Constable (Female).

faq.question: Q2. What is the advertisement number for HP Police Constable Male posts?
faq.answer: The Male post advertisement number is 57/7-2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the advertisement number for HP Police Constable Female posts?
faq.answer: The Female post advertisement number is 58/7-2026.

faq.question: Q4. When does the HPPSC Police Constable online application start?
faq.answer: The online application starts on 10 July 2026 at 12:01 AM.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for HP Police Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 6 August 2026, till 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for HP Police Constable posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will get Level 3 pay scale, Rs. 20,200–64,000.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website to apply for HPPSC Police Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online at www.hppsc.hp.gov.in/hppsc.
